task_completion.description: Log in to Ekylibre using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre web interface is visible in the browser, showing the user is logged in (e.g., dashboard, navigation menu).

task_completion.description: Create the first new activity production for the 2024 campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form being filled out for a new activity production with dates in 2024, or a list showing the newly created production for the 2024 campaign.

task_completion.description: Create a second new activity production for the 2024 campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form being filled out for a second new activity production with dates in 2024, or a list showing the second newly created production.

task_completion.description: Create a third new activity production for the 2024 campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form being filled out for a third new activity production with dates in 2024, or a list showing the third newly created production.

task_completion.description: Assign each of the three productions to a distinct land parcel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Different land parcel names or IDs are visible in the production creation forms or the final productions list for the three new entries.

task_completion.description: Use at least two different crop activity types across the three parcels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least two different crop names (e.g., Wheat, Corn, Barley) are visible as the selected activity types across the three new productions.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ekylibre web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and Ekylibre GUI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered data into the web forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into form fields, selecting dropdowns, and clicking save buttons in the Ekylibre interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open to manipulate the DOM to fake the appearance of created productions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target campaign year: 2024. Minimum new productions required: 3. Minimum distinct crop activities required: 2. Ekylibre URL: http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000. Admin email: admin@ekylibre.org. Admin password: 12345678.
